_comment: MCP Configuration for Claude Code — ROI Demo Tools
Copy this to ~/.claude/mcp.json (or merge with existing config).
When developers use these tools in Claude Code, OTEL Stream 2
automatically captures every tool_use event with:
• These flow → CloudWatch → QuickSight ROI Dashboard
Each MCP server runs as a stdio subprocess managed by Claude Code.
No port conflicts, no HTTP setup — just add and go.

semantic-search._description: Intelligent doc search with query expansion. Searches internal docs/wiki with synonym expansion (auth → OAuth, SSO, SAML, JWT). OTEL tracks: search latency, result quality, expansion effectiveness.

code-review._description: Automated code review: security scan (secrets, SQLi, XSS), lint check, best practices. OTEL tracks: findings by severity, review duration, files analyzed. Critical findings caught = incidents prevented = ROI.

cicd-trigger._description: GitLab CI/CD pipeline management. Trigger pipelines, check status, get logs. OTEL tracks: trigger latency, pipeline outcomes, developer time saved vs manual GitLab navigation.

calculator._description: Token budget estimator and cost calculator for all Bedrock models. OTEL tracks: estimation requests, model preferences, budget awareness. Teams that estimate costs have lower Bedrock spend.
